description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, dark exterior, likely covered in chocolate ganache or fondant. The cake features a pair of spherical decorations on top, resembling cherries, with a thin, curved stem and a small green leaf attached to one of them. The surface of the cake is even and glossy, giving it a polished, elegant appearance. The overall shape is low and wide, with the decorative elements positioned off-center, adding visual interest. The cake sits directly on a flat surface without any visible plate or stand. Its minimalist design and subtle detailing make it suitable for upscale urban bakeries or patisseries.
description: A round, single-tier cake with a glossy dark finish, topped with two cherry-like decorations and a green leaf. The cake has a minimalist, elegant appearance and sits directly on a flat surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cake's smooth, round surface and the two cherry-like decorations with a green leaf clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the cake's sloped top and the back of the cherry decorations, with the leaf and stem visible from behind.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the cake's round profile and the two spherical decorations on top, with the leaf and stem seen from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cake's round shape and the stem with the leaf, but only one cherry decoration is visible from this angle.
